title: Morning Brief UI & Follow-up Policy
description: In-app Morning Brief experience. Follow-ups appear IN the brief as action items with draft links — never auto-sent via Gmail. User copies/sends manually. Builds on prd_100 engine.

userStories.title: Morning Brief page and dashboard entry point
userStories.description:
New page frontend/src/pages/MorningBriefPage.jsx at route /brief.

- useQuery fetches GET /api/brief/today via hook useMorningBrief()
- Sections rendered as prioritized cards (follow-ups first, then interviews, matches, approvals)
- Each item: title, body, CTA link (React Router Link to action_url)
- Empty state: 'Your brief generates at 8am — check back soon'
- Add nav link in dashboard header/sidebar: 'Brief' with Sun icon

Compose from components/, no direct api calls in page.
acceptanceCriteria: Vitest smoke test for page render
userStories.notes: MorningBriefPage at /brief, useMorningBrief hook, NavBar Brief link with Sun icon, section cards, vitest smoke test.

userStories.title: Follow-up items in brief with draft links
userStories.description:
Enhance morning_brief follow_ups section:
- Each item links to /dashboard?selected={app_id}&action=follow-up
- DetailPanel reads action=follow-up query param and auto-expands FollowUpDraftSection

Brief item text: '{company} — follow-up overdue' with subtext 'Draft ready in detail panel'

Do NOT pre-generate LLM drafts in brief job (too expensive). User clicks through to generate on demand.

Explicit policy comment in morning_brief.py: 'NEVER send email via Gmail API — drafts are user-initiated only.'
acceptanceCriteria: Brief follow-up items link to detail panel
No Gmail send code paths added
userStories.notes: Follow-up brief items link with action=follow-up; DetailPanel auto-expands FollowUpDraftSection; policy comment in morning_brief.py.

userStories.title: Audit and guardrail — no auto-send follow-ups
userStories.description:
Verify codebase has zero Gmail send capability for follow-ups.

1. Grep for gmail send, messages.send, send_email in email_integration — document findings
2. Add test backend/tests/test_follow_up_policy.py asserting sync_emails and notification jobs do NOT call any send function
3. If AGENT_ROADMAP.md mentions auto-send, add note at top: 'Deferred — user copies drafts manually per product policy'

No functional Gmail send implementation in this story — guardrails only.

userStories.title: morning_brief_ready in-app notification handling
userStories.description:
Frontend NotificationBell: handle type morning_brief_ready — icon Sun, title 'Your morning brief is ready', action_url /brief.

Backend notification_service: ensure create_notification supports morning_brief_ready type (add to allowed types constant if enum exists).

Clicking notification navigates to /brief.
